evaluator_ref.description: Resolve the latest revision of this evaluator.

evaluator_variant_ref.description: Resolve the latest revision on this variant.

max_depth.title: Max Depth
max_depth.description: Maximum recursion depth when following embedded references. Defaults to 10.

max_embeds.title: Max Embeds
max_embeds.description: Maximum number of embeds to resolve. Defaults to 100.

error_policy.description: How to handle embed-resolution errors (`exception` or `fallback`).

schema.title: EvaluatorRevisionResolveRequest
schema.description: Body for resolving embedded references on an evaluator revision's `data`.
